description.ko: 빛이 유리를 통과할 때의 거동을 시각적으로 탐구한 작품으로, 백색광이 굴절의 물리적 원리를 통해 숨겨진 본연의 무지개색으로 분해되는 정밀한 순간을 보여줍니다.
description.en: A stunning visual exploration of light's behavior as it passes through glass, showcasing the precise moment white light breaks into its hidden primary colors through the physics of refraction.

prompt: Hyper-realistic macro photography of a sophisticated glass prism set against a minimalist dark background, a single concentrated beam of white light piercing through the crystal and dispersing into a brilliant, wide-angled rainbow spectrum, sharp caustic light patterns, chromatic aberration, high-speed photography style, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting.
